examples:
Command Example
gcs-upload-file entry_id=889@a7c34bf4-a552-49b2-83b6-e95590596286 bucket_name=my-bucket object_name=/some/path/my_file.txt object_acl=bucketOwnerRead
Human Readable Output
File some_source_file.txt was successfully uploaded to bucket my-bucket as /some/path/my_file.txt
8. Retrieve the Access Control List of a bucket
Retrieves the Access Control List of a bucket.
Base Command
gcs-list-bucket-policy

Command Example
gcs-list-bucket-policy bucket_name=my-bucket
Human Readable Output
ACL policy for bucket my-bucket
Bucket
Entity
Email
Role
name: gcs-list-bucket-policy

outputs.description: Name of the bucket holding the Access Control List. GCS.BucketPolicy.Entity The entity holding the permission.
outputs.name: GCS.BucketPolicy.Bucket

outputs.description: Email address associated with the entity (if any). GCS.BucketPolicy.Role The access permission for the entity.
outputs.name: GCS.BucketPolicy.Email

outputs.description: Project team associated with the entity (if any).
outputs.name: GCS.BucketPolicy.Team
